name: BB:Threats: HTTP Client Status
notes: This Building Block detects when the malformed web server client request.
bb_references: BB:Threats: HTTP Client Status on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Malformed Client Request
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: HTTP Client Status on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Malformed Client Request
